title: Crash in circt-verilog: Assertion `succeeded(result) && "expected ConstantLike op to be foldable"' failed.
body:
I'm just getting started with CIRCT and was eager to try out the SystemVerilog frontend. But I didn't get far. On commit d8d7574eabda05cc54ad7724bed686bba8eed888, I'm getting the following. It's totally possible I'm misusing the tool, but since it asked for a bug report so nicely, here we go :-) 


```
❯ ../circt/build/bin/circt-verilog ../circt/test/Conversion/ImportVerilog/basic.sv 
circt-verilog: /home/philipp/src/circt/llvm/mlir/include/mlir/IR/Matchers.h:92: bool mlir::detail::constant_op_binder<AttrT>::match(mlir::Operation*) [with AttrT = mlir::Attribute]: Assertion `succeeded(result) && "expected ConstantLike op to be foldable"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
 #0 0x0000000002308a76 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) /home/philipp/src/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:723:22
```
